role: Walk-only neon night-market connector from Westgate parking/offramp into Blacklight Kids club district.
district_connection: Blacklight Kids nightclub / night market territory
gameplay_notes: Walk-only chunk after the Westgate parking/offramp area.
No van driving beyond the Westgate parking area.
Market stalls, signs, walls, tents, and buildings are baked into the base art for this connector.
Use invisible Red Concord detection cones later for cameras and patrols.
Connects toward the Blacklight Kids nightclub interior.
